name: Freeform Board (8×8)
author: AGP
description: An UNENFORCED 8×8 board set up for chess, played on the honor system: either player may move, capture, or remove any piece freely — no rules are checked and no legal moves are highlighted. Use it to play any 8×8 variant by hand, set up positions, or analyze. There is no computer opponent; end a game by resigning or by agreeing to a draw.
